race.comment: PRIVATEER (9) put in a much better effort last start when just finding one better at Mornington, beaten a head when firmly in the market. She's had a few chances but finds a winnable race here and can go one better. Wary of ASTIQUER (6) who debuts. She's a filly by Capitalist out of G1 winning mare Nettoyer for the Hayes yard. She's been jumping out well and finds a nice race to kick off in. STERNIN (11) is another to have had a few chances, also coming off a second placing at Hamilton. She was only run down late there and should be in this for a long way too. ATTUMA (1) resumes having struggled in a good maiden here on debut. No surprise to see her do much better this time around. SHINY DIAMOND (10) is a filly by Super Seth on debut who can run well.
